mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B

SELECT A.id , A.name , A.password , A.manager , A.contact , A.conManager , A.conContact , date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as createDate , A.location , A.role , A.userId , A.address , A.isDel , A.groupIdx , A.secretCode , A.conduct , A.fcIdx , A.longCalYn , A.ubcYn , A.originDataYn , A.showPdfYn , IFNULL((SELECT blockedYn FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION_BLOCK WHERE constructionIdx = A.id), 0) AS blockedYn , IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONTRACT WHERE CONSTRUCTION_IDX = A.id AND isDel = 0), 0) AS contractCount , IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONTRACT_CONFIG c WHERE A.createDate >= c.APPLY_FROM_DATE), 0) AS contractRequired , IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION_SETTING_CONFIG c WHERE A.createDate >= c.APPLY_FROM_DATE), 0) AS settingRequired , IFNULL((SELECT skipYn FROM TB_CONTRACT_SKIP WHERE constructionIdx = A.id), 0) AS contractSkipYn , B.groupName FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
ORDER BY (case when A.id = 1482 then 10000 else (case when A.id = 587 then 9999 else 0 end) end ) desc , A.conduct ASC, A.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT A.id , A.name , A.manager , A.password , A.contact , A.conManager , A.conContact , date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as createDate , A.location , A.role , A.userId , A.address , A.isDel , A.groupIdx , A.secretCode , A.conduct , A.fcIdx , A.longCalYn , A.ubcYn , A.originDataYn , A.showPdfYn FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_GROUP B
ORDER BY (case when A.id = 1482 then 10000 else (case when A.id = 587 then 9999 else 0 end) end ) desc , A.conduct ASC, A.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}
